title: Deployment Intent
description: Schema-validated deployment intent for the rds-db2-provision-skill. Layer-1 JSON Schema: declares the dialect, canonical snake_case field set, single-boolean on/off fields, always-required set, core enums, the _provenance object (R4.1/4.5/4.6/4.10, R5.2, R18.1), and the conditional parameter dependencies of R18/R4.7/R4.8/R19 expressed via if/then/else, dependentRequired, oneOf, and not. Cross-field arithmetic (R19.6/7/8 ratio bounds and floor(iops/4) throughput derivation) is intentionally NOT here: JSON Schema cannot express it, so it lives in the Layer-2 code validator.

schema_version.description: Version of this intent schema the document targets.

deployment_tier.description: Named sizing-and-governance baseline; equal to the Environment tag value (R3.1).

workload_size.description: T-shirt sizing selector resolved through the Workload_Sizing_Map (R17.1).

engine.description: Db2 engine edition; accepted only when it exactly matches one of these three (R5.2).

engine_version.description: Resolved engine version (for example 12.1.4). Never fabricated; resolved from the live API (R5.1).

db_name.description: Initial database name (<= 8 chars for Db2).

port.description: Db2 non-SSL TCP listener port (default 8392). Dormant under DB2COMM=SSL. Must be a valid TCP port (1-65535) and must not equal the fixed SSL service port 50443 (R18.13).

license_model.description: Licensing model. Constrained to bring-your-own-license; for db2-se/db2-ae this is the required value (R18.11). CE consistency is reconciled by the validator.

instance_class.description: RDS instance class (for example db.r7i.2xlarge). x86-only constraint enforced by the resolver/validator (R17.15).

allocated_storage.description: Allocated storage in GiB. Must be less than 64000 (R19.1). Per-storage-type minimums (gp3>=20, io2>=100) are applied conditionally. Ratio rules are validator concerns (R19.6/8).

storage_type.description: EBS storage type; only gp3 and io2 are supported (R18.1).

multi_az.description: Multi-AZ on/off (single boolean, not a flag|no-flag pair) (R4.5).

backup_retention_period.description: Automated backup retention in days. Valid RDS range 0-35 (R18.10). Multi-AZ/standby require >=1, enforced conditionally below.

storage_encrypted.description: Storage encryption on/off (single boolean). Always true in produced deployments (R6.1).

kms_key_id.description: Customer-managed MRK CMK ARN/ID for storage encryption (R6.1).

vpc_security_group_ids.description: Security group IDs attached to the instance.

db_subnet_group_name.description: DB subnet group name (existing or to-be-created).

vpc_id.description: VPC ID the instance and its networking live in. Always customer-provided (the skill never creates a VPC); required by the 5-rds and 1-networking modules.

db_parameter_group_name.description: DB parameter group name. May be empty so the composer resolves the family-based default.

monitoring_interval.description: Enhanced monitoring interval in seconds (0 = disabled). Valid RDS values only. monitoring_role_arn dependency is enforced conditionally (R18.4).

enable_cloudwatch_logs_exports.description: Db2 log types to export to CloudWatch Logs. Constrained to RDS-for-Db2-supported types (R18.12).

tags.description: Resource tags. Mandatory tag presence (Project/Environment/Owner) is enforced by the validator (R14).

iops.description: Provisioned IOPS. Required for io2 and for gp3>=400 GiB; forbidden for gp3<400 GiB (R18.3, R19.4/5). For gp3>=400 the schema bounds it to 12000-64000; the iops/allocated_storage ratio is a validator rule (R19.6/8).

storage_throughput.description: Provisioned storage throughput in MiBps. Allowed only for gp3>=400 GiB; forbidden for io2 and gp3<400 GiB (R18.3, R19.4). Exact value (floor(iops/4) capped 4000) is a validator rule (R19.7).

monitoring_role_arn.description: IAM role ARN for Enhanced Monitoring. Required when monitoring_interval > 0 (R18.4).

manage_master_user_password.description: When true, RDS manages the master password in Secrets Manager with master_user_secret_kms_key_id; mutually exclusive with a manual master_password (R18.5).

master_user_secret_kms_key_id.description: Customer-managed CMK ARN/ID for the RDS-managed master-user secret. Required when manage_master_user_password is true (R18.5).

master_password.description: Manually supplied master password. Mutually exclusive with the managed master password (R18.5).

availability_zone.description: Pinned single Availability Zone. Forbidden when multi_az is true (R18.9).

domain.description: AWS Managed AD directory ID to join. Presence selects the AWS-managed-AD branch; mutually exclusive with the self-managed-AD fields (R18.6, R18.8).

domain_iam_role_name.description: IAM role granting RDS access to the directory service. Required for either AD join mode (R18.6, R18.7).

domain_fqdn.description: Self-managed AD fully qualified domain name (for example company.com). Part of the self-managed-AD field set (R18.7).

domain_ou.description: Self-managed AD organizational unit (for example OU=RDSDb2,DC=company,DC=com) (R18.7).

domain_auth_secret_arn.description: Secrets Manager ARN holding the self-managed AD username/password (R18.7).

domain_dns_ips.description: One or two DNS server IP addresses for the self-managed AD (R18.7).

db_instance_identifier.description: DB instance identifier. Must satisfy the RDS identifier format (R20.3).

_provenance.description: Per-field provenance marker; each property value is exactly one of user_provided or assumed (R4.10, R2.2, R2.3).

allOf.$comment: R18.3 / R19.3: io2 requires iops, forbids storage_throughput, and needs allocated_storage >= 100 GiB.
R4.7 / R18.2 / R19.5: gp3 with allocated_storage >= 400 GiB requires both iops and storage_throughput; iops constrained to 12000-64000 (ratio is a validator rule).
R4.7 / R19.4: gp3 with allocated_storage < 400 GiB forbids both iops and storage_throughput (RDS baseline applies).
R18.5: master password is exactly one of managed (manage_master_user_password=true + master_user_secret_kms_key_id) or manual (master_password).
R18.6 / R18.8: AWS Managed AD (domain present) requires domain_iam_role_name and forbids the self-managed AD fields.
R18.7 / R18.8: self-managed AD (any self-managed field present) requires all four self-managed fields plus domain_iam_role_name and forbids domain.
R18.9 / R18.10: multi_az=true forbids a pinned availability_zone and requires backup_retention_period >= 1.
